validation.notes: Roadmap derived from architecture.md roadmap section. Two delivery surfaces: Python TDD (steps 01-01 through 02-01) and markdown forge (steps 02-02 through 04-01).

phases.name: Config and Domain Foundation
phases.description: Profile definitions, domain value objects, port, adapter

steps.name: Rigor profile definitions and tier mapping config
criteria: Four profiles defined: lean, standard, thorough, exhaustive
Each profile specifies model tier for all 8 agent roles
Three tiers mapped to concrete model IDs: basic, standard, strongest
Schema version present for future evolution
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: code/tdd. JSON config files. Read-only plugin-level config. Model tier names abstract over concrete model IDs.

steps.name: RigorProfile domain objects and validation
criteria: RigorProfile value object is frozen (immutable dataclass)
Profile name validated against known set (lean, standard, thorough, exhaustive)
Invalid profile name produces domain error with valid profile list
Missing rigor-profile.json resolves to standard default
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: code/tdd. Pure domain objects, no infrastructure imports. Frozen dataclass for RigorProfile. ProfileValidator and DiffComputer also in this module.

steps.name: Rigor port and filesystem adapter
criteria: Per-proposal rigor file readable and writable via port interface
Atomic write follows .tmp/.bak/rename protocol
Profile definitions loadable from plugin config directory
Model tier mapping loadable with .sbir/ override detection
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: code/tdd. Port interfaces: RigorProfileReader, RigorProfileWriter, RigorDefinitionsReader, ModelTierReader. Adapter implements all four. Atomic write via .tmp/.bak/rename.

phases.name: Service and Resolution Skill
phases.description: Application service for profile management, orchestrator resolution skill

steps.name: Rigor service with diff computation and history
criteria: Profile change produces per-agent-role diff showing what changes
History entry appended with from/to/timestamp/wave fields
Same-profile set returns no-op confirmation message
No-active-proposal returns guidance error
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: code/tdd. Application service using rigor port. No direct file I/O. Computes diff via DiffComputer from rigor.py.

steps.name: Rigor resolution skill for orchestrator
criteria: Resolution chain documented: read profile -> lookup definitions -> resolve tier -> model ID
Comparison table rendering logic for /proposal rigor show
Detail view rendering for /proposal rigor show <profile>
Agent-role-to-agent-name mapping table included
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: forge/skill. Markdown skill loaded by orchestrator. Display uses model tier names (basic/standard/strongest), not concrete model IDs.

phases.name: Commands and Orchestrator Integration
phases.description: New rigor command, proposal-new integration, orchestrator rigor-aware dispatch

steps.name: Rigor command and proposal-new integration
criteria: /proposal rigor show displays comparison table of all profiles
/proposal rigor show <profile> displays detail view for one profile
/proposal rigor set <profile> updates rigor with diff display
/proposal new creates rigor-profile.json with standard default
Contextual suggestion based on fit score and phase
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: forge/command. New proposal-rigor.md command. Modify proposal-new.md to create rigor-profile.json and show suggestion.

steps.name: Orchestrator rigor-aware agent dispatch
criteria: Orchestrator loads rigor-resolution skill before agent dispatch
Every agent dispatch includes model parameter from rigor resolution
Behavioral params (review passes, critique iterations) included in task prompt
Wave header displays active rigor level
Missing rigor-profile.json defaults to standard behavior
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: forge/agent-edit. Add rigor skill to orchestrator frontmatter. Add resolution logic to dispatch section. Add agent-role mapping to wave-agent-mapping skill.

phases.name: Status, Debrief, and Polish
phases.description: Rigor visibility in status, switch, and debrief outputs

steps.name: Rigor in status, switch, and debrief
criteria: Active proposal status line includes rigor level
Portfolio view shows rigor for each proposal
Switch loads target proposal's rigor config
Debrief shows rigor summary with change history
Lean-only proposals show skipped critique loops in debrief
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: forge/command-edit + agent-edit. Modify existing commands and agent to read and display rigor state.
